reasoning: Deus Ex GOTY is an Unreal 1 engine game that originally defaulted to the Glide renderer. Research indicated that on macOS, the DirectX 9 (D3D) renderer works best. The game was pre-configured by modifying DeusEx.ini to use D3DDrv.D3DRenderDevice instead of GlideDrv.GlideRenderDevice, and updating the resolution from 640x480 to 1024x768 with 32-bit color depth. The d3dx9 winetricks verb was installed to provide DirectX 9 dependencies. With these changes, the game launched successfully and ran for 44 seconds with exit code 0, confirming proper operation.
